name: Barbecue Venison Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place aluminum foil on hot grill with sides folded up to prevent any runoff of juices.
2. Place the chops on the foil.
3. Add beer, chopped onion, and butter to the chops.
4. Sprinkle garlic salt over the chops each time you turn them.
5. When the chops are done, remove the foil from the grill.
6. Return the chops to the grill and sprinkle with garlic salt each time you turn them until they are charcoal black.
